senses.gloss: daybreak, early morning, time between fajr and sunrise

examples.english: He is glorified there morning and evening.

examples.text: مَن اِشْتَدَّ إِلْحَاحُهُ تَوَالَى غُدُوُّهُ وَرَوَاحُهُ
examples.english: Whoever becomes persistent, his coming and going become more frequent (Abu Hayyan al-Tawhidi)

examples.text: وَلِسُلَيْمَـٰنَ ٱلرِّيحَ غُدُوُّهَا شَهْرٌۭ وَرَوَاحُهَا شَهْرٌۭ ۖ
examples.english: And to Solomon ˹We subjected˺ the wind: its morning stride was a month’s journey and so was its evening stride.

body.text: : see the next preceding paragraph, in there places.
